title: The Red Rose
content: On Valentine's Day, Daniel bought a single red rose. He was nervous because it was the first time he wanted to tell Sophie how he felt. After work, he waited outside her office. When she came out, he gave her the flower with a shy smile. Sophie looked surprised, then smiled warmly. She said she had hoped he would ask her out someday. They walked to a nearby restaurant together, talking and laughing. The red rose stayed on her desk for many days as a happy reminder of that evening.
